subject: Agent #20: Audit i18n + currency (₹) + date formatting + locale conventions
description: Audit every currency, date, number, and locale formatting in FE/BE quotation feature surface. Catalog all `Intl.*`, `toLocale*`, `format*`, date-picker, ₹, and INR-specific patterns with file:line refs. Cross-check FE and BE formatting for consistency. Check mobile-frozen contracts.
